name: songbird-collection
description: A custom marketplace of Claude Code plugins for both experienced developers and vibe coders, extending Claude Code with workflows, commands, and integrations that fit how you actually build.

plugins.name: hestia
plugins.description: Always-on guardrails for Claude Code. Seven standing orders every session — lean, phase discipline, truth-grounding, scope control, memory hygiene, communication, formatting. On demand: audit setup, catch stale files, grade and write rules, prep for unfamiliar tech. Read-only — recommends, you act.

plugins.name: iceberg
plugins.description: Turns your team's coding rules into automatic errors that get caught while writing code, not after. Works with TypeScript, Python, Rust, JVM, .NET, and Go. Use it to enforce rules while coding, check an existing project for violations, or set up rules in a new one.

plugins.name: jetbrains-router
plugins.description: Makes Claude read and edit files through your JetBrains IDE rather than directly from disk. This gives Claude your IDE's error detection, smarter file searches, and visibility into changes you haven't saved yet. Still works if the IDE isn't running. Requires JetBrains 2025.2+ with MCP Server enabled.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Investigates your codebase before you build. Parallel domain experts surface integration points and risks, an adversarial critic stress-tests the plan against real code — nothing gets implemented without your sign-off.

plugins.name: nudge
plugins.description: Reviews your session and teaches you how to write better prompts. Run it at the end of any working session to get concrete rewrites of your most improvable prompts — with plain-language explanations of why each change would have helped Claude understand you better.
